gadgets-desc:
Waxaa loo ogolyahay iticmaale-yaasha in ay dooqdaan 
[[Special:Gadgets|Ku darista CSS iyo JavaScript dheeraad]] ku jira [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-gadgets|dooqyadooda]]
prefs-description-gadgets: Daar astaamo dheeraad ah oo loogu talagalay akoonkaaga.
gadgets-prefstext:
Hoos waxaa ku qoran liiska aaladaha gaarka ah ee aad u daaran karto akoonkaaga.
Aaladahani badankood waxay ku shaqeeyaan JavaScript, sidaas darteed JavaScript waa inuu ka daaran yahay biraawsarkaaga si ay u shaqeeyaan.
Sidoo kale ogow in aaladahani aysan wax saameyn ah ku yeelan doonin boggan dookhyada.

Sidoo kale ogow in aaladahan gaarka ahi aysan qayb ka ahayn barnaamijka MediaWiki, waxaana badanaa sameeya oo dayactira isticmaaleyaasha wiki-gaaga deegaanka.
Maamulayaasha deegaanka ee interface-ka waxay wax ka beddeli karaan [[MediaWiki:Gadgets-definition|qeexitaannada]] aaladaha la heli karo, halka maamulayaasha deegaanka ay wax ka beddeli karaan [[Special:Gadgets|sharraxaadahooda]], halkaas oo aad ka arki karto koodhka isha ee aalad kasta. Tirada isticmaaleyaasha aalad kasta ee wiki-kan waxaa lagu taxay [[Special:GadgetUsage|tirakoobka isticmaalka aaladaha]].
gadgets-prefstext-safemode: Aaladaha hadda lama heli karo sababtoo ah habka badbaadada ayaa daaran. Fadlan [[#mw-input-wpforcesafemode|dami habka badbaadada]] si aad u isticmaasho aaladaha.
gadgetusage-intro: Jadwalkan wuxuu muujinayaa tirada isticmaalayaasha ee karti u yeeshay qalab kasta (gadget) ee wiki-kan. Isticmaale firfircoon waxaa loo tiriyaa qof sameeyay wax ka beddel 24-kii saac ee ugu dambeeyay {{PLURAL:$1|maalin|$1 maalmood}}. Liiskani kuma jiro tirakoobka qalabka si caadi ah u shaqeeya ee qof walba u furan, waxaana ku jiri kara qalab aan hadda la heli karin.
gadgetusage-intro-noactive: Jadwalkaan wuxuu muujiyaa tirada adeegsadayaasha sameeyay dhammaan ku darista wikigaan. Liiskaan wuu ka reebayaa tirakoobka ku darista loo sameeyay dhammaan si ka soo qaad ah laga yaabee in ay ka mid tahayku daris aan la heli karin.
gadgets-pagetext:
Hoos waxaa ku yaala liis dheeraad gaar ah kasoo ay suurto gal tahay in uu la shaqeeyo akoonkaada [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-gadgets|bogga dooqyada]], waxaad ku ogaan kartaa [[MediaWiki:Gadgets-definition|aqoonsiga]].
Muuqaalkaan wuxuu sahlayaa galid fudud ee bogagga farriimaha sistemka taasoo qeexaysa kuudka iyo dhamaan dheeraadka.
gadgets-required-skins: Waxaa loo heli karaa {{PLURAL:$2|$1 muuqaalka|muuqaaladan soo socda: $1}}.
gadgets-required-actions: Ku kooban {{PLURAL:$2|"$1" falka bogga|falalkan bogga ee soo socda: $1}}.
gadgets-required-namespaces: Ku kooban {{PLURAL:$2|magaca qaybta $1|magacyada qaybaha soo socda: $1}}.
gadgets-required-contentmodels: Ku kooban {{PLURAL:$2|nooca nuxurka $1|noocyadan nuxurka ee soo socda: $1}}.
gadgets-legacy: Aaladda lama soo shubin. Fadlan u guur ResourceLoader. ([https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/ResourceLoader/Migration_guide_(users) Macluumaad dheeraad ah])
gadgets-packaged: Aaladdan waa [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/ResourceLoader/Package_files la baakadeeyay], waxaana laga bilaabaa $1
gadgets-export-text:
Si aad u dhoofiso $1 qalabka, guji "{{int:gadgets-export-download}}" batoonka, waxaad soo rogtay fayl gali, kadib aad Special:Import on destination wiki and upload it. kadib halkaan ku shub MediaWiki:Gadgets-definition bogga: 
$2
Waa inaad leedahay qalab munaasab ku ah wiki (ay ka mid tahay inaad xaq uleedahay bedelida farrimaha sistemka) sidoo kale inaad awood uleedahay soo dhoofsashada faylasha.
gadgets-requires-es6: Aaladdan waxaa kaliya lagu taageeraa biraawsarrada u hoggaansan ES6
gadgets-validate-wrongtype: Astaanta $1 waa in ay noqotaa nooca $2.
gadgets-validate-json: Faylasha JSON waa la qeexay laakiin lama isticmaalin. Waxay kaliya ansax yihiin aaladaha la baakadeeyay.
gadgets-validate-es6default: Aaladaha u baahan ES6 laguma daaran karo si caadi ah.
gadgets-validate-noentrypoint: Calaamadda baakadka waa la iska indhatiray maadaama aan la qeexin faylal qoraal ah.
gadgets-validate-noscripts: Script-yada waa la iska indhatiray, sababtoo ah aaladdan waxay dejisay type=styles.
gadgets-validate-stylepeers: Aaladaha la midka ah waa la iska indhatiray, sababtoo ah kani waa aalad kaliya qaabka. Deji type=general si aad u beddesho.
gadgets-validate-scriptsnotallowed: Faylasha script-ka iyo xogta lama isticmaalin, sababtoo ah aaladdan waxay dejisay type=styles.
gadgets-validate-invalidjs: Script $1 lama isticmaalin, sababtoo ah nooca nuxurka "$2" waa khalad.
gadgets-validate-invalidcss: Qaabka CSS-ka $1 lama isticmaalin, sababtoo ah nooca nuxurka "$2" waa khalad.
gadgets-validate-invalidjson: Bogga xogta $1 lama isticmaalin, sababtoo ah nooca nuxurka "$2" waa khalad.
gadgets-validate-nopeer: Aaladda la midka ah "$1" waa la iska indhatiray, sababtoo ah ma jirto.
gadgets-validate-invalidpeer: Aaladda la midka ah "$1" waa la iska indhatiray, sababtoo ah ma aha aalad kaliya qaabka.
gadgets-validate-invalidcontentmodels: Nooca nuxurka ee soo socda {{PLURAL:$2|ma jiro|ma jiraan}}: $1
gadgets-validate-invalidnamespaces: Lambarka magac-meelaha ee soo socda {{PLURAL:$2|ma jiro|ma jiraan}}: $1
gadgets-validate-unknownpages: Waxay ka kooban tahay hal ama in ka badan bogag aan lahayn dhammaadka .js, .css ama .json. Lama isticmaali doono.
gadgets-validate-duplicate: Qeexid labaad oo aaladda $1 ah ayaa la ogaaday waxaana la iska indhatiri doonaa
gadgets-supports-urlload: Aaladdan waxay taageertaa in lagu soo shubo URL iyadoo la adeegsanayo cabbirka su’aasha ?withgadget.
